title: Specific Ricoh MFP and Printer Products - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability via Web Image Monitor (CVE-2025-41393) in IM C320F
explanation: Ricoh has identified a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability (CVE-2025-41393) affecting IM C320F
affect: This vulnerability could allow an arbitrary script to be executed remotely.

models.name: IM C320F
models.version: CTL System: V1.09 and earlier (For V1.08, Part Number LRC3175 is unaffected, but D0EX5550L is affected.)

checkVersion:
How to view the firmware version and the part number:
1. Access Web Image Monitor from your browser.
https://"IP address or hostname of the device"
2. Log in with Administrator privileges.
3. Navigate to Device Management > Configuration > Device Settings > Firmware Update
measures:
Please download the updated firmware at the following link:
https://support.ricoh.com/bb/html/dr_ut_e/rc3/model/imc320f/imc320f.htm
contact: Please contact your local Ricoh representative or dealer if you have any queries.

history.changes: Corrected Product name, Affected versions, Resolution

authenticityGuarantee: Please note that any copy or paraphrase of the text of this document that differs in content from the distribution URL link, or omits the URL, is an uncontrolled copy and may lack important information or contain factual errors.
